riskAssessment.vixRegime: VIX 18.42 (normal range 15-20). Complacency değil, fear değil. Normal volatilite.
riskAssessment.sectorRotation: Tech/Cybersecurity (PANW, TENB, AMAT) strong. Semiconductors mixed (AMAT strong, WDC weak). Biotech weak (OMER, CAPR). Small-cap (IWM) lagging large-cap.
riskAssessment.earningsRisk: AVAV, CNXC, QMCO after-close. CNXC expected move ±19.60% = yüksek risk. CRMT BMO açıldı.
riskAssessment.macroRisk: FOMC öncesi dönem, piyasa bekleyişte. Geopolitical tensions (Middle East) oil prices affecting sentiment.
